# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
  labels:
    linkerd.io/is-control-plane: "false"

---
# Service Account for API Gateway
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: microservices

---
# Service Account for User Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: user-service
  namespace: microservices

---
# Service Account for Order Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: microservices

---
# Service Account for Payment Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: microservices

---
# API Gateway Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-request: "100m"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-request: "64Mi"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-limit: "500m"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-limit: "256Mi"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-log-level: "warn,linkerd=info"
    config.linkerd.io/default-inbound-policy: all-unauthenticated
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: api-gateway
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: api-gateway
      containers:
        - name: api-gateway
          image: api-gateway:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http
            - containerPort: 8443
              name: https
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15

---
# API Gateway Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: api-gateway
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
    - name: https
      port: 443
      targetPort: 8443
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP

---
# User Service Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: user-service
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-request: "100m"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-request: "64Mi"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-limit: "500m"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-limit: "256Mi"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-log-level: "warn,linkerd=info"
    config.linkerd.io/default-inbound-policy: cluster-authenticated
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: user-service
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: user-service
      containers:
        - name: user-service
          image: user-service:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8081
              name: http
            - containerPort: 9091
              name: grpc
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15

---
# User Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: user-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: user-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8081
      targetPort: 8081
      protocol: TCP
    - name: grpc
      port: 9091
      targetPort: 9091
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP

---
# Order Service Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-request: "100m"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-request: "64Mi"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-limit: "500m"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-limit: "256Mi"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-log-level: "warn,linkerd=info"
    config.linkerd.io/default-inbound-policy: cluster-authenticated
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: order-service
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: order-service
      containers:
        - name: order-service
          image: order-service:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8082
              name: http
            - containerPort: 9092
              name: grpc
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8082
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8082
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15

---
# Order Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: order-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8082
      targetPort: 8082
      protocol: TCP
    - name: grpc
      port: 9092
      targetPort: 9092
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP

---
# Payment Service Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-request: "100m"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-request: "64Mi"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-limit: "500m"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-limit: "256Mi"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-log-level: "warn,linkerd=info"
    config.linkerd.io/default-inbound-policy: cluster-authenticated
    config.linkerd.io/opaque-ports: "3306"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: payment-service
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: payment-service
      containers:
        - name: payment-service
          image: payment-service:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8083
              name: http
            - containerPort: 9093
              name: grpc
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8083
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8083
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15

---
# Payment Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: payment-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8083
      targetPort: 8083
      protocol: TCP
    - name: grpc
      port: 9093
      targetPort: 9093
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP

---
# ============================================================
# SERVER POLICIES - Define how each service accepts traffic
# ============================================================

# Server policy for User Service HTTP port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: user-service-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# Server policy for User Service gRPC port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: user-service-grpc
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  port: grpc
  proxyProtocol: gRPC

---
# Server policy for Order Service HTTP port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: order-service-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# Server policy for Order Service gRPC port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: order-service-grpc
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  port: grpc
  proxyProtocol: gRPC

---
# Server policy for Payment Service HTTP port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payment-service-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# Server policy for Payment Service gRPC port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payment-service-grpc
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  port: grpc
  proxyProtocol: gRPC

---
# Server policy for API Gateway
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
# ============================================================
# MESH TLS AUTHENTICATION - Verify mesh identity
# ============================================================

# MeshTLSAuthentication for the entire namespace
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: mesh-authenticated-clients
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "*.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
# Specific identity for API Gateway
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-identity
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "api-gateway.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
# Specific identity for Order Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: order-service-identity
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "order-service.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
# Specific identity for Payment Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: payment-service-identity
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "payment-service.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
# ============================================================
# AUTHORIZATION POLICIES - Fine-grained access control
# ============================================================

# Allow API Gateway to access User Service HTTP
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-api-gateway-to-user-service-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: user-service-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: api-gateway-identity
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Allow API Gateway to access User Service gRPC
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-api-gateway-to-user-service-grpc
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: user-service-grpc
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: api-gateway-identity
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Allow API Gateway to access Order Service HTTP
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-api-gateway-to-order-service-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: order-service-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: api-gateway-identity
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Allow API Gateway to access Order Service gRPC
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-api-gateway-to-order-service-grpc
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: order-service-grpc
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: api-gateway-identity
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Allow Order Service to access Payment Service HTTP
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-order-to-payment-service-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: payment-service-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: order-service-identity
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Allow Order Service to access Payment Service gRPC
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-order-to-payment-service-grpc
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: payment-service-grpc
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: order-service-identity
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Allow Order Service to access User Service for user validation
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-order-to-user-service-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: user-service-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: order-service-identity
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Allow Payment Service to access User Service for billing info
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-payment-to-user-service-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: user-service-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: payment-service-identity
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# ============================================================
# HTTP ROUTES - Fine-grained route-level authorization
# ============================================================

# Define HTTP routes for User Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: user-service-get-users
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: user-service-http
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            value: /api/v1/users
            type: PathPrefix
          method: GET

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: user-service-create-user
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: user-service-http
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            value: /api/v1/users
            type: PathPrefix
          method: POST

---
# Allow only API Gateway to create users
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-api-gateway-create-users
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: HTTPRoute
    name: user-service-create-user
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: api-gateway-identity
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Allow API Gateway and Order Service to read users
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-read-users
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: HTTPRoute
    name: user-service-get-users
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: mesh-authenticated-clients
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Define HTTP routes for Order Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: order-service-orders
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: order-service-http
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            value: /api/v1/orders
            type: PathPrefix

---
# Define HTTP routes for Payment Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: payment-service-payments
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: payment-service-http
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            value: /api/v1/payments
            type: PathPrefix

---
# Payment route authorization - only Order Service can initiate payments
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-order-to-create-payments
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: HTTPRoute
    name: payment-service-payments
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: order-service-identity
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# ============================================================
# NETWORK AUTHENTICATION - Allow health checks from kubelet
# ============================================================

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: NetworkAuthentication
metadata:
  name: kubelet-probes
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  networks:
    - cidr: 0.0.0.0/0
    - cidr: "::/0"

---
# Health check probe server for all services
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: health-check-probes
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchExpressions:
      - key: app
        operator: In
        values:
          - api-gateway
          - user-service
          - order-service
          - payment-service
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
# Allow unauthenticated probe access for health checks
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-health-probes
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: health-check-probes
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: kubelet-probes
      kind: NetworkAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# ============================================================
# SERVICE PROFILES - Traffic management and retries
# ============================================================

# User Service Profile with retries and timeouts
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: user-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  routes:
    - name: GET /api/v1/users
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /api/v1/users(/[^/]*)?
      isRetryable: true
      timeout: 5s
    - name: POST /api/v1/users
      condition:
        method: POST
        pathRegex: /api/v1/users
      isRetryable: false
      timeout: 10s
    - name: PUT /api/v1/users
      condition:
        method: PUT
        pathRegex: /api/v1/users/[^/]+
      isRetryable: false
      timeout: 10s
    - name: DELETE /api/v1/users
      condition:
        method: DELETE
        pathRegex: /api/v1/users/[^/]+
      isRetryable: false
      timeout: 5s
    - name: GET /healthz
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /healthz
      isRetryable: true
      timeout: 2s
  retryBudget:
    retryRatio: 0.2
    minRetriesPerSecond: 10
    ttl: 120s

---
# Order Service Profile with retries and timeouts
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: order-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  routes:
    - name: GET /api/v1/orders
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /api/v1/orders(/[^/]*)?
      isRetryable: true
      timeout: 5s
    - name: POST /api/v1/orders
      condition:
        method: POST
        pathRegex: /api/v1/orders
      isRetryable: false
      timeout: 15s
    - name: PUT /api/v1/orders
      condition:
        method: PUT
        pathRegex: /api/v1/orders/[^/]+
      isRetryable: false
      timeout: 10s
    - name: GET /healthz
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /healthz
      isRetryable: true
      timeout: 2s
  retryBudget:
    retryRatio: 0.2
    minRetriesPerSecond: 10
    ttl: 120s

---
# Payment Service Profile with retries and timeouts
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: payment-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  routes:
    - name: GET /api/v1/payments
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /api/v1/payments(/[^/]*)?
      isRetryable: true
      timeout: 5s
    - name: POST /api/v1/payments
      condition:
        method: POST
        pathRegex: /api/v1/payments
      isRetryable: false
      timeout: 30s
    - name: POST /api/v1/payments/refund
      condition:
        method: POST
        pathRegex: /api/v1/payments/[^/]+/refund
      isRetryable: false
      timeout: 30s
    - name: GET /healthz
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /healthz
      isRetryable: true
      timeout: 2s
  retryBudget:
    retryRatio: 0.1
    minRetriesPerSecond: 5
    ttl: 120s
